collectiondata.overview:
Best Iceland Tour Packages from India – Explore the Land of Fire and Ice
Begin your journey with the best Iceland tour packages from India, offering an unforgettable blend of natural wonders, cultural insights, and thrilling adventures. According to the Icelandic Tourist Board, the country welcomes over 2 million visitors annually, drawn by its stunning landscapes and unique culture.

Why Choose Iceland Tour Packages from India?

Unique Natural Wonders and Adventure Opportunities
Iceland’s landscape is unparalleled—from erupting geysers and thundering waterfalls to vast glaciers and geothermal spas. These tours showcase Iceland’s unique natural wonders through expertly guided excursions. All excursions are conducted by licensed local guides to ensure safety and in-depth knowledge.

Easy Flight Connections via Europe for Indian Travelers
While there are no direct flights from India, convenient connections via European hubs such as London, Frankfurt, and Copenhagen make travel smooth. Typical flight durations range between 13–17 hours, including layovers.

Perfect for Nature Lovers, Adventure Seekers, and Photographers
Whether chasing the Northern Lights or hiking glacier trails, Iceland appeals to diverse travelers. Families, solo travelers, and honeymooners alike find tailored experiences. It's advisable to consult your physician before engaging in high-altitude or glacial treks. If you’re interested in other kinds of journeys, explore our solo travel packages or exciting adventure tour packages.

Top Iceland Tour Packages from India

7 to 10 Days Iceland Tour Packages – Reykjavik, Golden Circle & Blue Lagoon
Our most popular 7 days Iceland tour packages from India affordable option includes iconic landmarks and relaxation spots, blending exploration with comfort. Sample itineraries are available upon request to help visualize the journey.

Iceland Northern Lights Tour Packages from India
Experience the magic of the Aurora Borealis with specialized tours timed during peak viewing months. Professional guides provide photographic tips and real-time weather updates to enhance the experience.

Budget-Friendly Iceland Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
We offer a range of packages to suit different budgets without compromising on experience or comfort. Starting prices typically begin around INR 1.45 lakh per person for a 6–7 day itinerary.

Customized Iceland Itineraries for Families and Groups
Tailor-made tours accommodate group size, interests, and pace, ensuring everyone—from children to seniors—can enjoy Iceland’s wonders safely. Family-specific itineraries often include whale watching, horse riding, and interactive museums. For more options, check our family tour packages.

Must-Visit Destinations in Iceland Covered in Tour Packages

Reykjavik – Capital City and Cultural Hub
Explore Iceland’s vibrant capital, blending historic charm with modern culture, including museums, art galleries, and local cuisine. Reykjavik is pedestrian-friendly, and many attractions are within walking distance.

Golden Circle – Geysers, Waterfalls & Thingvellir National Park
Visit the world-famous geysers, majestic waterfalls, and the rift valley of Thingvellir National Park—a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

Blue Lagoon – Geothermal Spa Experience
Relax in the soothing, mineral-rich waters of the Blue Lagoon, a must for rejuvenation after active days. Advance reservations are strongly recommended.

Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon and Diamond Beach
Witness stunning icebergs drifting into the Atlantic, and explore black sand beaches sparkling with glacial ice. These areas are generally safe but can be slippery; exercise caution.

Vatnajokull National Park – Europe's Largest Glacier
Hike or take guided tours around Europe's largest glacier, a true highlight for adventurers. Accessibility may vary by season; check local advisories before visiting.

What’s Included in the Best Iceland Tour Packages from India?

Round-Trip Flights and Airport Transfers
Packages typically include flights from major Indian cities such as Mumbai, Delhi, and Hyderabad, with convenient airport transfers. Most packages feature 1–2 layovers through European cities.

Comfortable Hotel Accommodation with Breakfast
Stay in well-reviewed hotels offering local breakfast options to start your days right. Accommodations range from cozy guesthouses to luxury hotels.

Guided Tours, Local Transportation & Entry Fees
All sightseeing, transport between destinations, and park entry fees are handled seamlessly by your tour operator. Travel is typically in small-group, heated minibuses.

Visa Assistance and Travel Insurance
Our packages include full assistance for Icelandic visa processing and travel insurance for your peace of mind. We also help compile supporting documents such as hotel bookings and return flights.

Best Time to Visit Iceland from India

June to August – Midnight Sun and Mild Weather
Ideal for extended daylight hours and outdoor activities like hiking and whale watching. Book early for peak-season availability.

September to March – Northern Lights and Winter Activities
Experience the magical auroras, winter sports, and cozy Icelandic festivals. Layers and thermal clothing are essential during this period.

Tips for Avoiding Crowds and Getting the Best Deals
Travel during shoulder seasons or book well in advance for discounts and a quieter experience. Flexible travel dates and weekday departures often cost less.

Frequently Asked Questions About Iceland Tour Packages from India

Do Indian citizens require a visa to visit Iceland?
Yes, a Schengen visa is mandatory. Our India to Iceland tour package includes full visa support to simplify the process.

How many days are ideal for an Iceland tour from India?
We recommend 7 to 10 days to fully enjoy the key sights without rushing. Our 7 days Iceland tour packages from India affordable options provide a balanced itinerary.

Is Iceland safe and suitable for families and solo travelers?
Absolutely. Iceland ranks among the safest countries in the world and is well-equipped for all types of travelers.

What are Iceland honeymoon tour packages from India affordable options?
We offer tailored romantic packages that balance adventure and relaxation within reasonable budgets. Sunset lagoon visits, spa sessions, and glacier walks are highlights. See also our romantic honeymoon packages.

What should I know about Iceland's northern lights tour packages from India?
Tours are timed between September and March for optimal viewing, with expert guides assisting you in the best locations. Northern lights sightings depend on solar activity and weather conditions.

Do you provide Iceland cultural and historical tour packages from India?
Yes, including visits to Reykjavik’s museums, Thingvellir National Park, and traditional Icelandic villages with Viking heritage.

How to Book the Best Iceland Tour Packages from India

Trusted Indian Travel Agencies Offering Iceland Tours
Choose reputed agencies like Travelxploria known for transparent pricing and expert support. Read online reviews to verify quality.
​
Online Booking Tips and Discount Offers
Book early and watch for festive season sales or early bird discounts. Use trusted booking platforms and double-check refund policies.

Important Travel Documents and Packing Essentials
Carry a valid passport, Schengen visa, travel insurance, layered clothing, waterproof gear, power adapters, and sturdy walking shoes.
For travelers interested in other fascinating destinations, explore our India to Egypt Tour Package, morocco tour package from india, or even kenya tour packages from india.

packages.overview:
• Begin your journey in Hungary’s vibrant capital.

  • Explore the iconic sights and rich history of Budapest.

  • Relax in one of Europe’s largest thermal baths.

  • Travel to Austria’s elegant and cultural capital.

  • Discover Vienna’s grand architecture and royal heritage.

  • Enjoy Vienna at your own pace.

  • Journey to the fairytale city of Prague.

  • Visit the historic Prague Castle complex.

  • Explore the UNESCO-listed medieval town.

  • Bid farewell with memories of Central Europe’s finest gems.

Arrive in Budapest, Hungary’s enchanting capital straddling the Danube River, where history and modern charm blend seamlessly. Upon arrival at the airport or station, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax or begin exploring the nearby surroundings. Whether it's strolling along the scenic banks of the Danube or discovering the grandeur of historic landmarks like the Parliament Building or Chain Bridge, Budapest welcomes you with its rich culture and warm hospitality. Your Central European journey begins in this captivating city known for its thermal baths, vibrant streets, and architectural wonders.

Embark on a fascinating journey through the city guided by an expert Travelxploria representative who brings history to life. Buda Castle, Fisherman's Bastion, Matthias Church, and St. Stephen’s Basilica. A tour through the heart of Budapest lets you discover both the Buda and Pest sides of the city. The guide will walk you through key historical landmarks, such as the majestic Buda Castle, the stunning Fisherman's Bastion, and the iconic Matthias Church. You’ll also visit the beautiful St. Stephen’s Basilica in Pest, which is home to Hungary’s most revered relic.

Experience pure relaxation with a visit to the renowned Széchenyi Thermal Bath, one of Europe’s largest and most iconic spa complexes. With your entrance ticket, step into a world of rejuvenation as you explore the beautifully designed neo-baroque architecture and soak in the mineral-rich thermal waters sourced from natural hot springs. Choose from a variety of indoor and outdoor pools, saunas, and steam rooms, perfect for unwinding after a day of sightseeing. Whether you're easing travel fatigue or simply indulging in wellness, the Széchenyi Spa offers a quintessential Budapest experience, blending history, health, and luxury in a truly unique setting.

Travel from Budapest to Vienna by train and enjoy a smooth and scenic ride through the heart of Central Europe. The journey takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours, offering comfortable seating and picturesque views of the countryside along the way. Departing from Budapest’s Keleti Railway Station, you’ll head west toward Austria’s sophisticated capital. Upon arrival at Vienna’s central station, make your way to your hotel and settle in. The rest of the day is free for you to begin exploring the elegant streets, grand palaces, and cultural richness that define Vienna, setting the tone for the next chapter of your journey.

Discover the elegance and imperial grandeur of Austria’s capital on a comprehensive Vienna city tour that includes entrance to the majestic Schönbrunn Palace. Begin by exploring Vienna’s most iconic landmarks such as the Ringstrasse, Hofburg Palace, St. Stephen’s Cathedral, and the Vienna State Opera, while learning about the city’s rich Habsburg history and cultural legacy. The highlight of the tour is a guided visit to Schönbrunn Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where you’ll walk through opulent state rooms and beautifully maintained gardens. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and royal charm, showcasing Vienna’s timeless allure.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Vienna, a city that effortlessly blends imperial grandeur with vibrant modern culture. Take this opportunity to explore at your own pace—perhaps stroll through the charming streets of the Old Town, relax at a traditional Viennese café with a slice of Sachertorte, or visit one of the city’s many renowned museums or galleries. For nature lovers, the beautifully manicured gardens of Schönbrunn Palace or the Prater Park offer a peaceful escape. Whether indulging in local cuisine, shopping for souvenirs, or simply soaking in the city’s timeless charm, Vienna promises a relaxing and enriching experience.

Travel from Vienna to Prague by train and enjoy a comfortable journey through the scenic landscapes of Central Europe. The ride takes approximately 4 hours, with modern trains offering spacious seating and amenities for a relaxing trip. Departing from Vienna Hauptbahnhof, you’ll pass rolling hills, charming villages, and open countryside as you make your way to the Czech Republic’s fairytale capital. Upon arrival at Prague’s main station, head to your hotel for check-in. The rest of the day is yours to begin exploring the cobbled streets, Gothic spires, and vibrant atmosphere of this enchanting city known for its rich cultural heritage.

Explore Prague Castle, one of the largest and most magnificent ancient castles in the world, with a guided tour by Travelxploria. Walk through the historic Castle District, where an expert guide will share fascinating stories about its royal past and architectural marvels. Visit the awe-inspiring St. Vitus Cathedral, a masterpiece of Gothic design, and wander along the charming Golden Lane, lined with colorful historic houses. This immersive tour provides a deeper understanding of Prague’s rich heritage, blending royalty, legend, and breathtaking scenery. With Travelxploria’s seamless service, this unforgettable journey offers the best way to experience Prague Castle’s splendor.

Just a short drive from Prague, embark on a magical day trip to Cesky Krumlov, a UNESCO World Heritage site, with the best on-ground support from Travelxploria. This fairy-tale town boasts a well-preserved medieval center, charming cobblestone streets, and a breathtaking castle overlooking the Vltava River. Stroll through its winding alleys, admire the picturesque architecture, and soak in the scenic river views. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, you’ll uncover the town’s rich history and enchanting beauty. This tour promises an unforgettable experience, making Cesky Krumlov a must-visit destination for history lovers and travelers seeking timeless charm.

With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, you’ll uncover the town’s rich history and enchanting beauty. This tour promises an unforgettable experience, making Cesky Krumlov a must-visit destination for history lovers and travelers seeking timeless charm.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Prague\"]","inserted_id":"[515]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Prague/Day Trip to Cesky Krumlov/1740738271832-istockphoto-1255930777-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Prague/Day Trip to Cesky Krumlov/1740738271920-istockphoto-1018157122-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Prague/Day Trip to Cesky Krumlov/1740738271966-istockphoto-544814826-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Prague/Day Trip to Cesky Krumlov/1740738272008-istockphoto-901681026-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Prague/Day Trip to Cesky Krumlov/1740738272014-istockphoto-1278780842-612x612.jpg\"}]"}}]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable journey through Central Europe comes to a close, it’s time to bid farewell to the magical city of Prague. After breakfast, check out from your hotel and meet your transfer to the airport or train station for your onward journey. Reflect on the incredible experiences—from Budapest’s thermal baths and Vienna’s imperial elegance to Prague’s fairy-tale charm. With your heart full of memories, stunning photos, and meaningful souvenirs, you leave with a deeper appreciation for Europe’s cultural treasures. Though your trip ends here, the stories and moments you've collected will stay with you for a lifetime.

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

overview:
Best Iceland Tour Packages from India – Explore the Land of Fire and Ice
Begin your journey with the best Iceland tour packages from India, offering an unforgettable blend of natural wonders, cultural insights, and thrilling adventures. According to the Icelandic Tourist Board, the country welcomes over 2 million visitors annually, drawn by its stunning landscapes and unique culture.

Why Choose Iceland Tour Packages from India?

Unique Natural Wonders and Adventure Opportunities
Iceland’s landscape is unparalleled—from erupting geysers and thundering waterfalls to vast glaciers and geothermal spas. These tours showcase Iceland’s unique natural wonders through expertly guided excursions. All excursions are conducted by licensed local guides to ensure safety and in-depth knowledge.

Easy Flight Connections via Europe for Indian Travelers
While there are no direct flights from India, convenient connections via European hubs such as London, Frankfurt, and Copenhagen make travel smooth. Typical flight durations range between 13–17 hours, including layovers.

Perfect for Nature Lovers, Adventure Seekers, and Photographers
Whether chasing the Northern Lights or hiking glacier trails, Iceland appeals to diverse travelers. Families, solo travelers, and honeymooners alike find tailored experiences. It's advisable to consult your physician before engaging in high-altitude or glacial treks. If you’re interested in other kinds of journeys, explore our solo travel packages or exciting adventure tour packages.

Top Iceland Tour Packages from India

7 to 10 Days Iceland Tour Packages – Reykjavik, Golden Circle & Blue Lagoon
Our most popular 7 days Iceland tour packages from India affordable option includes iconic landmarks and relaxation spots, blending exploration with comfort. Sample itineraries are available upon request to help visualize the journey.

Iceland Northern Lights Tour Packages from India
Experience the magic of the Aurora Borealis with specialized tours timed during peak viewing months. Professional guides provide photographic tips and real-time weather updates to enhance the experience.

Budget-Friendly Iceland Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
We offer a range of packages to suit different budgets without compromising on experience or comfort. Starting prices typically begin around INR 1.45 lakh per person for a 6–7 day itinerary.

Customized Iceland Itineraries for Families and Groups
Tailor-made tours accommodate group size, interests, and pace, ensuring everyone—from children to seniors—can enjoy Iceland’s wonders safely. Family-specific itineraries often include whale watching, horse riding, and interactive museums. For more options, check our family tour packages.

Must-Visit Destinations in Iceland Covered in Tour Packages

Reykjavik – Capital City and Cultural Hub
Explore Iceland’s vibrant capital, blending historic charm with modern culture, including museums, art galleries, and local cuisine. Reykjavik is pedestrian-friendly, and many attractions are within walking distance.

Golden Circle – Geysers, Waterfalls & Thingvellir National Park
Visit the world-famous geysers, majestic waterfalls, and the rift valley of Thingvellir National Park—a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

Blue Lagoon – Geothermal Spa Experience
Relax in the soothing, mineral-rich waters of the Blue Lagoon, a must for rejuvenation after active days. Advance reservations are strongly recommended.

Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon and Diamond Beach
Witness stunning icebergs drifting into the Atlantic, and explore black sand beaches sparkling with glacial ice. These areas are generally safe but can be slippery; exercise caution.

Vatnajokull National Park – Europe's Largest Glacier
Hike or take guided tours around Europe's largest glacier, a true highlight for adventurers. Accessibility may vary by season; check local advisories before visiting.

What’s Included in the Best Iceland Tour Packages from India?

Round-Trip Flights and Airport Transfers
Packages typically include flights from major Indian cities such as Mumbai, Delhi, and Hyderabad, with convenient airport transfers. Most packages feature 1–2 layovers through European cities.

Comfortable Hotel Accommodation with Breakfast
Stay in well-reviewed hotels offering local breakfast options to start your days right. Accommodations range from cozy guesthouses to luxury hotels.

Guided Tours, Local Transportation & Entry Fees
All sightseeing, transport between destinations, and park entry fees are handled seamlessly by your tour operator. Travel is typically in small-group, heated minibuses.

Visa Assistance and Travel Insurance
Our packages include full assistance for Icelandic visa processing and travel insurance for your peace of mind. We also help compile supporting documents such as hotel bookings and return flights.

Best Time to Visit Iceland from India

June to August – Midnight Sun and Mild Weather
Ideal for extended daylight hours and outdoor activities like hiking and whale watching. Book early for peak-season availability.

September to March – Northern Lights and Winter Activities
Experience the magical auroras, winter sports, and cozy Icelandic festivals. Layers and thermal clothing are essential during this period.

Tips for Avoiding Crowds and Getting the Best Deals
Travel during shoulder seasons or book well in advance for discounts and a quieter experience. Flexible travel dates and weekday departures often cost less.

Frequently Asked Questions About Iceland Tour Packages from India

Do Indian citizens require a visa to visit Iceland?
Yes, a Schengen visa is mandatory. Our India to Iceland tour package includes full visa support to simplify the process.

How many days are ideal for an Iceland tour from India?
We recommend 7 to 10 days to fully enjoy the key sights without rushing. Our 7 days Iceland tour packages from India affordable options provide a balanced itinerary.

Is Iceland safe and suitable for families and solo travelers?
Absolutely. Iceland ranks among the safest countries in the world and is well-equipped for all types of travelers.

What are Iceland honeymoon tour packages from India affordable options?
We offer tailored romantic packages that balance adventure and relaxation within reasonable budgets. Sunset lagoon visits, spa sessions, and glacier walks are highlights. See also our romantic honeymoon packages.

What should I know about Iceland's northern lights tour packages from India?
Tours are timed between September and March for optimal viewing, with expert guides assisting you in the best locations. Northern lights sightings depend on solar activity and weather conditions.

Do you provide Iceland cultural and historical tour packages from India?
Yes, including visits to Reykjavik’s museums, Thingvellir National Park, and traditional Icelandic villages with Viking heritage.

How to Book the Best Iceland Tour Packages from India

Trusted Indian Travel Agencies Offering Iceland Tours
Choose reputed agencies like Travelxploria known for transparent pricing and expert support. Read online reviews to verify quality.
​
Online Booking Tips and Discount Offers
Book early and watch for festive season sales or early bird discounts. Use trusted booking platforms and double-check refund policies.

Important Travel Documents and Packing Essentials
Carry a valid passport, Schengen visa, travel insurance, layered clothing, waterproof gear, power adapters, and sturdy walking shoes.
For travelers interested in other fascinating destinations, explore our India to Egypt Tour Package, morocco tour package from india, or even kenya tour packages from india.

packages.overview:
• Begin your journey in Hungary’s vibrant capital.

  • Explore the iconic sights and rich history of Budapest.

  • Relax in one of Europe’s largest thermal baths.

  • Travel to Austria’s
